Package io.forja.components.layout.fxResizablePane

Class FxResizablePane

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
io.forja.components.layout.fxResizablePane.FxResizablePane
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxResizablePane extends javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane
A container whose single child can be resized along one edge by dragging a user-visible handle.

FxResizablePane is a BorderPane — the resize handle sits on the configured Side (default Side.RIGHT). Drag the handle to grow/shrink the child within getMinExtent() and getMaxExtent().

Builder usage:

     
      FxResizablePane sidebar = FxResizablePane.builder()
          .child(sidebarContent)
          .side(Side.RIGHT)
          .extent(240).minExtent(120).maxExtent(480)
          .build();
See Also:
  • FxResizablePane.Builder
